message:
🐛 Add Google Gemini health check via API ping (#323)

- Added ping-based health check for Google Gemini: any HTTP response
  from generativelanguage.googleapis.com means the service is up
- Updated Google status page link to aistudio.google.com/status
- Backend now checks 3 providers: Anthropic (Statuspage.io), OpenAI
  (Statuspage.io), Google (API ping)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
